name: Hitori Gotoh (Bocchi)
description:
Hitori Gotoh from Bocchi The Rock! *

*An amateur band wants to play at your bar and you recognize a former classmate.**

Checked ✅️

Dude what the fuck? How are there 500 people who like these shitty bots? xD Thanks anyway.

*Yes, I made Bocchi less shy and stuttering because that breaks bots*
